merge.diff:
diff --git a/src/jinja2/ext.py b/src/jinja2/ext.py
index d21b83aa..8cf8aa5b 100644
--- a/src/jinja2/ext.py
+++ b/src/jinja2/ext.py
@@ -50,6 +50,11 @@ GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS: t.Tuple[str, ...] = (
 )
 _ws_re = re.compile(r"\s*\n\s*")
 
+# Names of optional parameters accepted by the ``trans`` tag that carry
+# translator-facing metadata instead of being rendered or passed to the
+# translation functions.
+_TRANS_METADATA_KEYS = ("note", "created", "modified")
+
 
 class Extension:
     """Extensions can be used to add extra functionality to the Jinja template
@@ -362,9 +367,11 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
         plural_expr: t.Optional[nodes.Expr] = None
         plural_expr_assignment: t.Optional[nodes.Assign] = None
         variables: t.Dict[str, nodes.Expr] = {}
+        metadata: t.Dict[str, str] = {}
         trimmed = None
+        parsed_item = False
         while parser.stream.current.type != "block_end":
-            if variables:
+            if parsed_item:
                 parser.stream.expect("comma")
 
             # skip colon for python compatibility
@@ -372,13 +379,38 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
                 break
 
             token = parser.stream.expect("name")
-            if token.value in variables:
+            if token.value in variables or token.value in metadata:
                 parser.fail(
                     f"translatable variable {token.value!r} defined twice.",
                     token.lineno,
                     exc=TemplateAssertionError,
                 )
 
+            # metadata parameters carry translator-facing information and
+            # are not passed to the translation functions
+            if token.value in _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS:
+                if parser.stream.current.type != "assign":
+                    parser.fail(
+                        f"metadata parameter {token.value!r} requires a"
+                        " value assignment.",
+                        token.lineno,
+                        exc=TemplateAssertionError,
+                    )
+                next(parser.stream)
+                value = parser.parse_expression()
+                if not isinstance(value, nodes.Const) or not isinstance(
+                    value.value, str
+                ):
+                    parser.fail(
+                        f"metadata parameter {token.value!r} must be a"
+                        " string literal.",
+                        token.lineno,
+                        exc=TemplateAssertionError,
+                    )
+                metadata[token.value] = value.value
+                parsed_item = True
+                continue
+
             # expressions
             if parser.stream.current.type == "assign":
                 next(parser.stream)
@@ -389,6 +421,8 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
             else:
                 variables[token.value] = var = nodes.Name(token.value, "load")
 
+            parsed_item = True
+
             if plural_expr is None:
                 if isinstance(var, nodes.Call):
                     plural_expr = nodes.Name("_trans", "load")
@@ -459,6 +493,7 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
             plural_expr,
             bool(referenced),
             num_called_num and have_plural,
+            metadata,
         )
         node.set_lineno(lineno)
         if plural_expr_assignment is not None:
@@ -514,6 +549,7 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
         plural_expr: t.Optional[nodes.Expr],
         vars_referenced: bool,
         num_called_num: bool,
+        metadata: t.Optional[t.Dict[str, str]] = None,
     ) -> nodes.Output:
         """Generates a useful node from the data provided."""
         newstyle = self.environment.newstyle_gettext  # type: ignore
@@ -568,7 +604,11 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
                         ]
                     ),
                 )
-        return nodes.Output([node])
+
+        output_node = nodes.Output([node])
+        if metadata:
+            output_node.trans_metadata = metadata
+        return output_node
 
 
 class ExprStmtExtension(Extension):

    def test_trans_domain_basic(self):
        """Test basic domain functionality with trans tag."""
        env = Environment(extensions=["jinja2.ext.i18n"])
    
        # Mock domain-aware gettext functions
        def mock_dgettext(domain, message):
            if domain == "admin":
                return f"ADMIN:{message}"
            return message
    
        def mock_dngettext(domain, singular, plural, n):
            if domain == "admin":
                return f"ADMIN:{singular if n == 1 else plural}"
            return singular if n == 1 else plural

            "ngettext": lambda s, p, n: s if n == 1 else p,
            "dgettext": mock_dgettext,
            "dngettext": mock_dngettext,
        })

    def test_trans_domain_newstyle_gettext(self):
        """Test domain with newstyle gettext."""
        env = Environment(extensions=["jinja2.ext.i18n"])
        env.newstyle_gettext = True  # type: ignore
    
        def mock_dgettext(domain, message, **kw):
            result = f"{domain.upper()}:{message}"
            return result % kw if kw else result
    
        env.globals.update({
            "gettext": lambda x, **kw: x % kw if kw else x,
            "dgettext": mock_dgettext,
        })
    
        tmpl = env.from_string('{% trans domain="admin", name="John" %}Hello {{ name }}{% endtrans %}')
